questions.question: The basic problem of all economies is
options: What to produce, how to produce and for whom to produce
How to produce and for whom to produce
What to produce and how to produce
For whom to produce and how to distribute

questions.question: The opportunity cost of an action is
options: The value of the best alternative forgone in order to pursue the action
The cost of the action in monetary terms
The time spent on the action
The resources used up in the action
The sum of money spent and the value of the next best alternative forgone

As the price of a good decreases, the quantity demanded decreases, and vice versa

questions.question: Which of the following will cause a movement along the demand curve for a good?
